Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi 5 Bus Timetable - Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street to Marina Mall

March 20, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system is designed to provide residents and visitors with affordable and reliable travel options throughout the city. One of the key routes is Bus 5, which connects Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street to Marina Mall. This bus service caters to both commuters and shoppers, making it a vital link in Abu Dhabi’s transit network. In this article, we’ll take a closer look at Bus 5, detailing its operational schedule, key stops, and additional features that enhance the travel experience for passengers.

Operational Details

Bus 5 operates with a consistent timetable, ensuring frequent service for passengers throughout the day. Below are the key timings for Bus 5, departing from both Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street and Marina Mall:

From Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street From Marina Mall
05:11 05:09
05:41 05:39
06:11 06:09
06:41 06:39
07:11 07:09
07:41 07:39
08:11 08:09
08:41 08:39
09:11 09:09
09:41 09:39
10:11 10:09
10:41 10:39
11:11 11:09
11:41 11:39
12:11 12:09
12:41 12:39
13:11 13:09
13:41 13:39
14:11 14:09
14:41 14:39
15:11 15:09
15:41 15:39
16:11 16:09
16:41 16:39
17:11 17:09
17:41 17:39
18:11 18:09
18:41 18:39
19:11 19:09
19:41 19:39
20:11 20:09
20:41 20:39
21:11 21:09
21:41 21:39
22:11 22:09
22:39  

Bus 5 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for the Bus 5 Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Travel on Bus 5 is facilitated through the Hafilat Card, which is Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare for traveling within one zone is AED 2, with an additional charge of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can conveniently top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks across the city, ensuring a smooth and efficient payment process.

Route Overview

Below is a comprehensive list of stops along this route:

  1. Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street The starting point, providing access to various commercial and residential areas.

  2. ADM A stop that connects passengers to various government and administrative offices.

  3. Bilal Bin Rebah Mosque A significant religious site for the local community.

  4. Al Reem Street A busy thoroughfare with various shopping and dining options.

  5. Abu Dhabi Mall A major shopping destination offering a wide range of retail and dining choices.

  6. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque Another important spiritual landmark along the route.

7.

  1. Fatimah Bint Mubarak Street Provides access to local neighborhoods and amenities.

  2. Sultan Bin Zayed The First Street A key street linking various districts in the city.

  3. Liwa Center A shopping center that caters to local residents.

  4. Emirates Diplomatic Academy A stop near a key institution for diplomatic training.

  5. Al Hist Street A residential area with access to local shops and services.

  6. Al Ayda Street Provides access to local residences and amenities.

  7. Zayed The First Street A vital arterial road in Abu Dhabi.

  8. Mubarak Bin Mohammed Street A busy street with numerous commercial establishments.

  9. Dana Plaza A mixed-use development with shops, dining, and offices.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Bateen Street A well-trafficked road leading to various neighborhoods.

  2. Al Khalidiya Ladies Park A popular park for relaxation and recreation.

  3. Police Station An important public service location.

  4. Corniche Street Offers stunning views and access to the Corniche waterfront.

  5. Federal National Council The legislative body of the UAE.

  6. Al Marsa Street A thoroughfare providing access to several local amenities.

  7. Marina Mall The final stop, a premier shopping and leisure destination.

Accessibility and Services

Bus 5 is designed to accommodate passengers with special needs, ensuring an inclusive travel experience. Key features include:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for those with mobility issues.
  • Audio-visual aids to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

This commitment to accessibility makes Bus 5 a suitable option for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

1.

  1. Heritage Village A cultural site that showcases traditional Emirati life and heritage.

3.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip on Bus 5 from Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street to Marina Mall, the traveler enjoyed a delightful exploration of Abu Dhabi. Boarding at Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street, they were greeted by the bus’s cleanliness and inclusive design. As the journey commenced, the bus meandered through bustling streets, revealing modern architecture alongside traditional Emirati culture. Notable sights included Abu Dhabi Mall, a popular shopping and dining hub, and the picturesque Corniche Beach, where locals jog and cycle along the waterfront.

Finally, the traveler arrived at Marina Mall, a vibrant complex offering diverse retail and leisure options, complemented by stunning marina views.

Travel Tips for Bus 5

  • Plan Your Journey: Check the bus timings in advance to minimize waiting times, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for efficient, cashless payments on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Stay Updated: Download the AD Mobility app for real-time bus updates and schedules.
  • Travel During Off-Peak Hours: For a more comfortable experience, try to avoid traveling during the morning and afternoon rush hours.

In conclusion, Bus 5 offers a reliable and convenient mode of transportation between Sheikh Zayed Bin Sultan Street and Marina Mall.

Whether you’re heading to the mall for shopping or simply exploring the city, Bus 5 guarantees a smooth and enjoyable journey across Abu Dhabi’s vibrant landscape. Hop on Bus 5 to experience the convenience of traveling through this beautiful city! For a complete overview of all available routes, be sure to check out the full Abu Dhabi bus list.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 20, 2026.
